rules.purpose: Exit decision overlay only; no broker orders and no route permission changes.
rules.shorts: short routes remain tactical unless a dedicated short-runner route proves itself.
rules.surge_runner: rel_vol>=15, move_pct>=4, entry<=10 => TP1 then trail.
rules.surge_scalp: rel_vol>=3 and move_pct>=2 => fixed target unless TP1 creates a paid runner.

operator_read: No open positions in fem_bot_status; classifying recent fires/opportunities only.
Runner candidates exist; these need TP1/partial discipline before any hold.

top_hold_or_trail.instruction: Take 60-70% at TP1, move stop to breakeven, trail the remaining runner.
